description: Implement rotated hitbox/attack-box editing so selected boxes can be rotated with a dedicated handle while remaining rectangular. Update editor interaction, geometry representation, and serialization/runtime loading for both hit and attack boxes so rotation is preserved and editable.

Add onion-skin support for frame-editing subviews used in RoomEditor. Provide per-mode toggles for Anchor, Hitbox, and AttackBox editors that render previous/next frame geometry as semi-transparent and non-editable overlays while keeping only the current frame interactive. Movement mode should remain unchanged. ALSO WHEN THE USER SELECTS A POINT / HIT BOX DONT RENDER OTHER POINTS / HITBOXES UNTIL THE CURRENT POINT OR HITBOX IS UNSELECTED OR ANOTHER HITBOX / POINT IS SELECTED VIA THE PANEL

Extend the Anchor editor left panel with a numeric Depth Offset textbox bound to the selected anchor. The field must display live depth_offset changes, allow direct edits, write through to current-frame anchor data, and trigger normal anchor update/save behavior.
